text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The training track is quiet at night,<n>perfect for
rumination.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I sit in the stands, thinking over the<n>training routine
for tomorrow, when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Good evening. Are you... thinking<n>about work... at
this hour?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Being a trainer... must be tough.
choice_data_list: What I'm doing now is no big—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of my reply, I notice the<n>sound of
someone running. When I<n>turn to look...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's... her.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I think you're amazing the way you<n>train diligently
all by yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Her running...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
C'mon... Run faster! I can't stop<n>here... not until I
catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a fire in her eyes, she runs as if<n>in pursuit of
someone invisible. It's<n>almost like...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Like... me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean... she's also... chasing<n>after
someone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... there's no one... in front of her...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, one more time! C'mon!<n>I got this!
I'm not finished yet.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? C-Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Good evening! Um, do you want to<n>run together
aga—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who exactly... are you chasing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We can't see... who you're chasing.<n>Do you
also... have a Friend... only<n>you can see?

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: W-well, rather than a "Friend," it's...<n>uh...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I imagine that you're there!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Because I look up to you a lot!

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
How should I describe this? I feel<n>incredibly
inspired just from seeing<n>you run.

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I felt jealous of your Friend, so I<n>thought... I'd
chase after you... who's<n>always chasing after
them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... me...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Mark my words! I won't give<n>up... not until I
catch up to you as you<n>continue challenging
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined... anyone would....<n>chase after
me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I only ever looked ahead... I only ever<n>looked at
my Friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This feels strange... To her, I'm...
choice_data_list: Her very own Friend, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm. I don't know... about that...<n>But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The me who's chasing... after<n>someone... as well
as the me... who<n>someone wishes... to chase...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I should be capable... of running in a<n>way that's...
fitting.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I want to visit... the hospital<n>tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Since she's chasing me... I'll run with<n>her... in the
flesh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a small bow of courtesy,<n>Manhattan Cafe
heads back to the<n>track, which has now become
eerily<n>empty.
